So, I thought this was going to be a good game, and it was! For sure! However after like 2 moths I got back on. And oh my gosh, the moderators are so bad. They just kick you for no reason, one time he kicked me on accident. Now dont get me wrong, some of these moderators are good. Some of the other reviews had this problem so I asked the moderators and they said they “wern’t one of them.”😞😞😞. Good game, but just fix your mod.

Ok when I got this game I thought it was a joke so I just messed around but after a while I saw the gamemodes and they were fun, when I was playing rising lava I met a chill admin who was just playing the game. He told me if I was new and I said yes because I just got the game, then he told me to join discord to report people so I joined the discord and I just chatted. Btw this game is super fun, not joking also I really like the hello and psst badge because people keep begging how to get it. 

In all
Gamemodes: 8.5
Moderators: 10 they taught me how to play
Game: 9

In all I rate the game 9.5
